Bash(cd "C:/Users/APC/Downloads/vss-code-saas-project/.planning/phases/04-n8n-workflow-migration" && python -c "
import json
d=json.load\(open\('vss-carousel-workflow-v12.json'\)\)
for node in d.get\('nodes', []\):
    if node['name'] == 'Chain LLM - Generate Carousel Prompts':
        params = node.get\('parameters', {}\)
        msg = params.get\('messages', {}\)
        vals = msg.get\('messageValues', []\)
        for v in vals:
            print\('SYSTEM MSG:'\)
            print\(v.get\('message',''\)[:2000]\)
        print\(\)
        print\('USER PROMPT \(text\):'\)
        print\(params.get\('text',''\)[:2000]\)
    if node['name'] == 'Output Parser':
        params = node.get\('parameters', {}\)
        print\('OUTPUT PARSER SCHEMA:'\)
        schema = params.get\('jsonSchemaExample',''\)
        print\(str\(schema\)[:2000]\)
" 2>&1)

import json
d=json.load\(open\('vss-carousel-workflow-v12.json'\)\)
for node in d.get\('nodes', []\):
    if node['name'] == 'Output Parser':
        params = node.get\('parameters', {}\)
        print\(json.dumps\(params, indent=2\)[:3000]\)
    if 'Gemini - Edit' in node['name']:
        params = node.get\('parameters', {}\)
        print\(f'=== {node[\\"name\\"]} ==='\)
        print\(json.dumps\(params, indent=2\)[:1000]\)
    if node['name'] == 'Code - Build Final Payload':
        params = node.get\('parameters', {}\)
        print\('=== Build Final Payload Code ==='\)
        print\(params.get\('jsCode',''\)[:2000]\)
" 2>&1)

        print\(json.dumps\(node.get\('parameters', {}\), indent=2\)\)
